tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting prediabetes or impaired glucose tolerance, though current glucose is normal. Creatinine is at the upper limit of normal, warranting monitoring of renal function. Chloride is slightly elevated and total CO₂ is mildly decreased, which may indicate a mild metabolic acidosis. Other parameters are within normal limits. Clinical correlation and follow-up are recommended.

text.div: Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
